villagediplomacy.bell.brave_ring: §6[%s] *rings the bell furiously* DANGER! EVERYONE TO THE SQUARE!
villagediplomacy.cmd.error.no_village_ne: §cNo village within 200 blocks. Stand closer to a village.
villagediplomacy.cmd.name_need_village: §cYou must be inside a village to name it!
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.0: Ah, our trusted ally arrives! Welcome back.
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.1: You've proven yourself a true friend of this village.
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.2: We talk about you at the council meetings, you know.
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.3: Your name is spoken with respect here.
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.4: The elders say you are like family now.
villagediplomacy.dialog.ally_visit.5: Our doors are never locked to you, friend.
villagediplomacy.dialog.become_ally: You are now considered an ally of our village!
villagediplomacy.dialog.become_enemy: You are now considered an enemy of our village!
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.0: Are you a hero? You look like a hero!
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.1: Mom says not to talk to strangers... but you seem nice.
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.2: I found a cool rock today! Wanna see?
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.3: When I grow up I want to be an adventurer too!
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.4: Do you have any cake? I like cake.
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.5: The golem let me pet it this morning!
villagediplomacy.dialog.children.6: I can run really fast. Watch!
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.0: Our village is glad to have your support!
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.1: We trust you, friend. Come back anytime.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.2: Thanks to you, our village thrives.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.3: You are always welcome at our hearths.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.4: The children speak of your deeds with admiration.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.5: Trade fair, friend, and our doors stay open for you.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.6: The golems nod when you pass. That means something.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.0: Hello, traveler. Welcome to our village.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.1: Good to see you around here.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.2: What brings you to our lands?
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.4: The elders still speak of travelers who helped us long ago.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.5: Mind the path—wolves get bold at dusk.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.6: If you're hungry, the baker might spare a loaf.
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.3: We remember what you did. Be gone!
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.4: Iron remembers every blow you've dealt here.
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.5: One more misstep and the meeting bell rings for you alone.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.0: A living legend walks among us! I can't believe it.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.1: My grandfather told stories of heroes like you.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.2: Songs will be written about your deeds. I'm sure of it.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.3: The children pretend to be you when they play.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.4: Even the golems seem to stand taller when you're near.
villagediplomacy.dialog.legendary.5: We would follow you into the Nether itself.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.0: This village was founded three generations ago, they say.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.1: There's a legend of a great hero who saved us long before you arrived.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.2: The well in the center has never run dry. Not once.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.3: Our first iron golem was built during a zombie siege, or so my grandmother said.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.4: We used to trade with a village to the east. Haven't heard from them in years.
villagediplomacy.dialog.lore.5: They say if you ring the bell at midnight, the old spirits wake.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.0: Rise and shine! Another day in the village.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.1: Good morning, traveler. The rooster woke us all.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.2: Early start today—fields don't tend themselves.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.3: The baker's bread already smells wonderful this morning.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.4: Frost on the ground today. Careful out there.
villagediplomacy.dialog.morning.5: I slept poorly. Something howled near the fence.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.0: We neither trust nor distrust you... yet.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.2: Our village remains cautious around outsiders.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.3: Trade fairly and we shall get along.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.4: We've seen heroes and villains wear the same cloak.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.5: Keep your sword sheathed unless the raid horn sounds.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.0: Go inside, traveler. Nothing good roams at night.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.1: I can't sleep... strange sounds outside.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.2: Keep a torch lit. Darkness brings danger.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.3: The iron golem seems restless tonight.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.4: My children asked me why the sky turns dark. I had no good answer.
villagediplomacy.dialog.night.5: Stars are clear tonight. A good omen, I hope.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.0: Could you help us recover something stolen?
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.1: We need a brave soul for a dangerous task.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.2: If you prove your worth, we will reward you well.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.3: Bring back three strings from spiders—we'll weave new nets.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.4: The river ran cloudy this morning. Could you look upstream?
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.0: We survived the raid! Thanks to those who fought.
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.1: Pillagers again... when will they leave us in peace?
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.2: The wall held this time. Next time I'm not so sure.
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.3: I hid in the cellar with my children. Terrible hours.
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.4: Every raid leaves scars. On the village and on us.
villagediplomacy.dialog.raid.5: Our golem fought bravely. I saw it take on three of them.
villagediplomacy.dialog.rain.1: I forgot to bring the hay inside... again.
villagediplomacy.dialog.rain.2: The children love puddles. I don't.
villagediplomacy.dialog.rain.3: Rain means the river runs well.
villagediplomacy.dialog.rain.4: My roof leaks on the east side. Terrible timing.
villagediplomacy.dialog.rain.5: At least the dust settles when it rains.
villagediplomacy.dialog.reputation_down: Your reputation with our village has decreased.
villagediplomacy.dialog.reputation_up: Your reputation with our village has improved!
villagediplomacy.dialog.storm.0: Get inside! Lightning strikes near the fields!
villagediplomacy.dialog.storm.1: Last storm knocked a tree onto the mill. We're still fixing it.
villagediplomacy.dialog.storm.2: The animals are frightened—I can't blame them.
villagediplomacy.dialog.storm.3: Thunder shook the bell tower last night. No cracks, thankfully.
villagediplomacy.dialog.storm.4: If the lightning hits the crops we'll go hungry.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.0: Looking to trade? I have fine goods.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.1: A fair deal benefits us both.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.2: I might have something useful for you.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.3: These prices are the best in the region!
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.4: Come, let us see what we can arrange.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.5: Emeralds don't lie—neither do my prices.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.0: Be careful, dark creatures roam nearby.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.1: We heard strange noises last night...
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.3: Our village has been under attack recently.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.4: Light a torch before the cellar—something skitters down there.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.5: The cartographer marks a ruin to the north. Tread carefully.
villagediplomacy.golem.danger.0: §8[§b%s§8] §7You have made yourself an enemy of this village!
villagediplomacy.golem.forgive.many: §a✓ The village iron guardians have forgiven you. (§7%s guardians§a)
villagediplomacy.golem.forgive.one: §a✓ An iron guardian has forgiven you.
villagediplomacy.golem.loyalty_line.devo: §8[§b%s§8] §7I will protect this village with my life!
villagediplomacy.golem.story.0: Created during a zombie siege to protect %s
villagediplomacy.golem.story.1: Forged by the village blacksmith in ancient times
villagediplomacy.golem.story.2: Awakened when the village was in grave danger
villagediplomacy.golem.story.3: Built by the elders to guard the village gates
villagediplomacy.golem.story.4: Formed from iron donated by grateful traders
villagediplomacy.golem.story.5: Created during a great celebration of peace
villagediplomacy.golem.story.6: Raised to honor a fallen hero of the village
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.violent.6: §8[§b%s§8] §7YOU'LL PAY FOR EVERY VILLAGER YOU HURT!
villagediplomacy.golem.title: %s §7(%s§7)
villagediplomacy.golem.warn2.gentle: §8[§b%s§8] §6 Please... I do not want to hurt you!
villagediplomacy.greet.cheerful.0: §e[%s] Oh, hello! Great to see you!
villagediplomacy.greet.cheerful.2: §e[%s] What a wonderful day to chat!
villagediplomacy.greet.extroverted.0: §d[%s] OH HEY! Come here, come here!
villagediplomacy.greet.extroverted.2: §d[%s] Let me tell you something amazing!
villagediplomacy.greet.extroverted.3: §d[%s] *rushes over* I've been waiting for someone to talk to!
villagediplomacy.greet.extroverted.4: §d[%s] You're just in time! Sit down, sit down!
villagediplomacy.greet.hotheaded.4: §c[%s] I don't have time for this!
villagediplomacy.greet.pessimistic.2: §7[%s] Nothing good ever happens here anyway.
villagediplomacy.greet.rep.enemy.0: §4[%s] You have a lot of nerve coming here.
villagediplomacy.greet.rep.hero.2: §6[%s] The village is safer with you here.
villagediplomacy.personality.flee.cautio: §e[%s] I should get out of here...
villagediplomacy.personality.gift_bread: §a[%s] Here—take this bread. You look hurt.
villagediplomacy.personality.title: §6【 %s 】
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.came: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Stop! We need that camel for travel!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We use those camels for desert routes!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.chic: §8[§fVillager§8] §7That chicken is part of our farm!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Stop! That cow provides milk for the village!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We depend on those cows for milk and leather!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Those cows are essential for our survival!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7Don't hurt our cows! We need milk!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.hors: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Stop! We need that horse for travel!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We use those horses for trade routes!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7I want to ride horses when I grow up!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That pig will feed families this winter!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7I feed that pig every day!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.rabb: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Those rabbits are part of our ecosystem!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7What did that rabbit ever do to you!?
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.shee: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Stop! We need that wool for blankets!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Those sheep keep us warm in winter!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.camel: §8[§fVillager§8] §7We needed that camel for DESERT TRAVEL!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That took WEEKS to tame and breed!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7How will we cross the desert now!?
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.chick: §8[§fVillager§8] §7That bird gave us eggs every morning!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Feathers and eggs—both gone thanks to you.
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.cow.a: §8[§fVillager§8] §7How will we feed our children without milk!?
§8[§fVillager§8] §7No milk, no cheese, no leather! Thanks to YOU!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.horse: §8[§fVillager§8] §7That took WEEKS to tame and breed!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We used that horse for trade routes!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That horse was part of the family!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Killing a horse!? You have NO HEART!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.pig.a: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You just killed our WINTER MEAT SUPPLY!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That pig was going to feed families!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.pig.b: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7That pig was going to have babies! *sobs*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.rabbi: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7I wanted to pet the bunny! *heartbroken*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.sheep: §8[§fVillager§8] §7MURDERER! We raised that sheep with care!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7I was going to shear her tomorrow! *devastated*
villagediplomacy.react.bed.caught.baby.2: §8[§fVillager Child§8] §7Mommy! A stranger is in my bed!
villagediplomacy.react.bed.denied.crimin: §8[§cVillager§8] §7You have NO right to rest here!
villagediplomacy.react.bed.denied.hostil: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You have NO right to rest here!
villagediplomacy.react.bed.denied.low.0: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You are not welcome to use our beds.
villagediplomacy.react.bed.denied.low.3: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Your reputation doesn't grant you this privilege.
villagediplomacy.react.bed.stolen.baby.2: §8[§fBaby§8] §7Mum! A stranger is in my bed!
villagediplomacy.react.bell.denied.hosti: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You have NO right to touch our bell!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That bell is not for people like you!
villagediplomacy.react.bell.denied.low.0: §8[§fVillager§8] §7We can't trust you with the village bell.
villagediplomacy.react.bell.ring.neg.0: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You have NO right to touch our bell!
villagediplomacy.react.bell.ring.neg.2: §8[§fVillager§8] §7That bell is not for people like you!
villagediplomacy.react.bell.ring.neutral: §8[§fVillager§8] §7We can't trust you with the village bell.
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.1: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Where am I supposed to sleep now!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.3: §8[§fVillager§8] §7*furious* That took me weeks to make!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.7: §8[§fVillager§8] §7I work all day and you break my bed!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.8: §8[§fVillager§8] §7*indignant* I'll sleep on the floor because of you!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7How will we call for help now!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Raiders could attack and we wouldn't know!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The whole village depends on these crops!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Do you know how hard farming is!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.1: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7Mom said don't touch the crops!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.3: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7Those were going to be bread!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.4: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7The carrots had faces in my head...
villagediplomacy.react.break.house.adult: §8[§fVillager§8] §7The door still had my height marks!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I built this with my own hands!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7My toys were in the corner...
villagediplomacy.react.break.well.baby.0: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7*crying* Where do we get water!
villagediplomacy.react.break.well.baby.2: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7Mom! The water place is broken!
villagediplomacy.react.break.workstation: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Do you know how expensive those are!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7*furious* How am I supposed to work now!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That station was essential to the village!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.mo: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Good morning! Our doors are always open to you!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.ni: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Welcome, friend. Travel safe in the dark!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Our home is yours, even at night!
villagediplomacy.react.door.neg.adult.8: §8[§fVillager§8] §7You have NO right to be here!
villagediplomacy.react.fencegate.adult.3: §8[§fVillager§8] §7What are you doing!? Those are OUR animals!
villagediplomacy.react.fencegate.adult.4: §8[§fVillager§8] §7STOP! It took ages to get them in there!
villagediplomacy.react.fencegate.baby.0: §8[§fVillager Child§8] §7Nooo! The animals are getting out!
villagediplomacy.react.fencegate.baby.4: §8[§fVillager Child§8] §7Dad is gonna be so mad!
villagediplomacy.react.flee.disliked.2: §8[§fVillager§8] §7I don't feel comfortable with you nearby.
villagediplomacy.react.gate.adult.3: §8[§fVillager§8] §7What are you doing!? Those are OUR animals!
villagediplomacy.react.gate.adult.4: §8[§fVillager§8] §7STOP! It took forever to get them in there!
villagediplomacy.react.golem.wanted.0: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7You're a wanted criminal! Surrender now!
villagediplomacy.react.golem.wanted.2: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7Your crimes will not go unpunished!
villagediplomacy.react.golem.wanted.3: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7*raises fist* Justice will be served!
villagediplomacy.react.golem.wanted.4: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7You are WANTED! Guards attack on sight!
villagediplomacy.react.greet.champion.1: §8[§b%s§8] §7Did you hear?! Oh wait, YOU ARE the hero!
villagediplomacy.react.greet.friendly.1: §8[§b%s§8] §7You! I was just talking about you!
villagediplomacy.react.greet.legend.1: §8[§b%s§8] §7The village owes you a great deal.
villagediplomacy.react.greet.trusted.2: §8[§b%s§8] §7The village is safe with you here!
villagediplomacy.react.guard.0: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7You're a wanted criminal! Surrender now!
villagediplomacy.react.guard.1: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7Your crimes will not go unpunished!
villagediplomacy.react.guard.2: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7*raises fist* Justice will be served!
villagediplomacy.react.guard.3: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7You're WANTED! Guards attack on sight!
villagediplomacy.react.guard.4: §8[§fVillage Guard§8] §7*stomps aggressively* GET OUT OF THIS VILLAGE!
villagediplomacy.react.place.anvil.unwel: §8[§fVillager§8] §7We don't trust you with an anvil!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We don't want weapons in OUR village!
villagediplomacy.react.place.anvil.welco: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Your smithing will serve the village well!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bed.unwelco: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Hey! You're not welcome to build here!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You can't just move in like that!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bed.welcome: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Your own bed! You're part of the village now.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Glad to have you living with us!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bell.welcom: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Excellent! Now we can signal each other!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bookshelf.w: §8[§fVillager§8] §7A scholar! We're lucky to have you.
villagediplomacy.react.place.brewing.wel: §8[§fVillager§8] §7We could use someone with your skills!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Dark magic! I knew you were trouble!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7This will make the village much stronger!
villagediplomacy.react.place.furnace.wel: §8[§fVillager§8] §7A furnace! We could use more industry!
villagediplomacy.react.place.lectern.unw: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Who do you think you are, a teacher!?
villagediplomacy.react.place.lectern.wel: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Will you share your knowledge with us?
villagediplomacy.react.place.loom.unwelc: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Trying to mark this as YOUR territory!
villagediplomacy.react.structure.friendl: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Do you really need to break that?
villagediplomacy.react.theft.chest.adult: §8[§fVillager§8] §7I worked YEARS for what's in there!
§8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7*cries* Mommy! They're stealing our stuff!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Our children will starve because of you!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The Iron Golem will hear about this!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.0: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7*sobs* That was my favorite toy!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.1: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7No no no! Not our food!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.9: §8[§fBaby Villager§8] §7Mommy is going to be so mad!
villagediplomacy.react.trade.0: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7You completed %s trade(s)! The village appreciates your business.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.1: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7%s successful trade(s)! Your standing grows.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.2: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7Great trading! The villagers are pleased.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.3: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7%s trade(s) done. The village trusts you more.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.4: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7Good trade! The village values your business.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.5: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7%s trade(s) made—you're becoming a valued customer.
villagediplomacy.react.villagerdeath.adu: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7MURDER! The village witnessed your crime!
§8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7A villager died by your hand!
villagediplomacy.react.villagerdeath.bab: §8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7You killed a CHILD! The village will NEVER forgive you!
§8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7MONSTER! You murdered an innocent child!
§8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7A baby... you killed a baby. Pure evil.
§8[§fVillage Diplomacy§8] §7The village weeps—you killed one of their children.
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.champion: The village honors you as a champion!
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.enemy: You are an enemy of this village!
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.hero: You are a hero of this village!
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.legendary_he: Your legend will be remembered forever!
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.suspicious: Villagers look at you with distrust.
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.suspicious_u: Villagers are beginning to trust you.
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.trusted_frie: You are a trusted friend of the village!
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.unwelcome: You are no longer welcome here.
villagediplomacy.rep.effect.wanted_crimi: You are WANTED! Guards attack on sight!
villagediplomacy.rep.level.0: §8[§4Villager§8] §4*looks away in fear* Stay away from us!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.down.enemy: §c§l%s You are an enemy of the village!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.down.untrade: §c§l%s Villagers refuse to trade with you!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.title: §e§l         REPUTATION TIER CHANGED
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.up.hero: §a§l%s You are a hero to this village!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.up.legend: §6§l%s The villagers bow to your presence!
villagediplomacy.sys.bed_denied: §8[§cVillage Diplomacy§8] §c§c✗ Denied! Your reputation is too low to use village beds.
villagediplomacy.sys.bell_ring: §8[§cVillage Diplomacy§8] §cYou rang the village bell without cause!

§8[§fVillager§8] §7Hm. Another raider. Could have handled it myself.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Do not expect a reward for that.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We have seen worse. But... thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You drove them back! The village owes you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7A raider, defeated! You have our gratitude.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7They came to pillage us... and you stopped them.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The Illagers fear you now. We are safer.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Our guardian strikes again! They never learn.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I knew you would come. You always do.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7With you here, no raider dares stay long.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The children cheer when they see you fight for us!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You are the reason this village still stands.
villagediplomacy.react.hostilekill.undea: §8[§fVillager§8] §7I did not ask for your help.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The undead are your problem too, outsider.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Fine. It is gone. Do not make a scene.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We have seen worse. But... thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7A zombie! You saved us from a horrible fate.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7The undead walk these roads... not for long with you here.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That skeleton would have shot one of us. Thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We do not forget those who protect us from the night.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Every undead you slay makes our nights safer.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You keep the dead at bay. We sleep soundly because of you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7My family prays for your health every night, friend.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Death itself walks here, and you push it back every time.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You have killed more undead than our whole guard combined.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I tell my children about you. A true protector.
villagediplomacy.react.hostilekill.creep: §8[§fVillager§8] §7It was going to explode. You stopped it. Sure.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We have rebuilt from worse than a creeper.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7My walls still stand. I suppose that matters.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That creeper would have levelled half the street!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I heard the hissing... then silence. You saved us.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Those things destroyed my old home once. Thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Quick thinking. That explosion would have hurt someone.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Only you could kill a creeper that close without flinching!
§8[§fVillager§8] §7My house nearly exploded. You are a legend.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7We do not even panic anymore when we see one. We know you are near.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7That green menace is gone. The village cheers for you!
villagediplomacy.react.hostilekill.spide: §8[§fVillager§8] §7They do not scare me. But... thanks.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I had it under control, you know.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Those fangs... I am glad you were nearby.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Spiders in the village again. Thank you for dealing with it.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7My children are terrified of those things. Thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I saw it crawling on the roof... I could not move.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Eight legs of doom, gone in a second. Incredible.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7My kids asked me if you are a superhero. I said yes.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7No spider dares come near when you patrol our streets.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You make this village feel safe. Truly.
villagediplomacy.react.hostilekill.other: §8[§fVillager§8] §7Whatever that was, it is dead now.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Strange creature. Glad it is gone, I suppose.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I did not need your help. But it is dealt with.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Hm. You killed it fast. I will give you that.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I do not know what that creature was, but it is gone now.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7A monster, defeated. Whatever it was, thank you.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Strange beasts wander these lands... I am glad you fight them.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Whatever dark magic summoned that thing, you ended it.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Only you could face something like that without hesitation.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7I have never seen such a creature. But you handled it like nothing.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7Monsters fear your name in this village. I am sure of it.
§8[§fVillager§8] §7You are the greatest protector this village has ever known.
